creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Roryan from comment #32)
Do you see the latest version? 
https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/databases/pgbackrest/Makefile

The python is in USES. The BUILD_DEPENDS isn't set in Makefile.
There isn't LZ4 option, the liblz4 is in LIB_DEPENDS.
The available options are SFTP and ZSTD. They've meson-variables.
